title: cruciata ciliata
intro: Cruciata ciliata, also known as Lesser Knotted Woodruff or Persicaria filiformis, is a perennial plant species in the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cruciata ciliata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the digestive system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
